title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know
The VLCC Market Remains under Persistent Downward Pressure Amid Oversupply, Reduced Demand - As we move into the second half of June and the final stretch of the first half of the year, renewed downward pressure is again the main dynamic for the VLCC market with sluggish performance in both the Atlantic and Pacific basins. Read More
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2024-06-18 104500.png | assets/2024-06-21_weekly-insights-review_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_d8836552a97e.png
Image reference: image-asset (1).jpeg | assets/2024-06-21_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset28129_90b611a5af4d.jpeg
Doric Weekly Market Insight
Global trade growth is expected to recover to 2.5 percent in the current year, showing improvement from the previous year but still significantly below the average rates observed in the two decades before the pandemic. Read More
Image reference: image-asset.jpeg | assets/2024-06-21_weekly-insights-review_img_image-asset_94446043cb1c.jpeg
From Commodore's Weekly Dry Bulk Reports
India produced approximately 144.4 billion kilowatt hours of electricity last month.
